## Pre-merge checklist — do NOT merge until every box is checked

- [ ] **CI `validate` is green** (analyze + tests + web build) on this PR
- [ ] **`no-mistakes` reported `checks-passed`** for this branch (or explicitly N/A)
- [ ] I reviewed the diff myself

> Reminder: merging before CI/`no-mistakes` finishes ships **un-validated** code to `main`
> (it has happened — the pipeline's fix commits land late). Wait for green.
